summary: Milestone Message Automation Workflow testing complete. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (1 skipped - no deliveries to test detail endpoint). Frontend: All key features verified in Founder portal (Milestones tab, stats cards, empty state). Operator portal verified via code review (nav item at line 270).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/milestones/deliveries - Lists deliveries filtered by status (pending_review default)
Backend: Stats endpoint requires staff role (admin/operator)
Backend: Deliveries list requires staff role
Backend: POST /api/milestones/report - Requires beneficiary role (403 for non-beneficiaries)
Backend: GET /api/milestones/deliveries/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent delivery
Backend: POST /api/milestones/deliveries/{id}/review - Returns 404 for non-existent pending delivery
Backend: Manager (operator) can access stats endpoint
Backend: Milestone report creates pending deliveries (NOT auto-deliver) - code verified
Frontend: Milestones tab visible in Founder Dashboard tab row
Frontend: Stats cards (Pending/Approved/Rejected) with counts displayed
Frontend: Empty state 'No Pending Deliveries' shown when count is 0
Frontend: Header 'Milestone Message Deliveries' with explanation text
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering correct: /stats defined before /{delivery_id} in milestone_deliveries.py
Milestone report (POST /api/milestones/report) correctly creates pending_review records instead of auto-delivering
Review endpoint (POST /api/milestones/deliveries/{id}/review) properly marks message as is_delivered=true on approve
Beneficiary notification triggered on approval via asyncio.create_task(notify.beneficiary(...))
All staff notified when milestone matches found via notify.all_staff()
Milestones nav item present in operator sidebar (Sidebar.js line 270)
test_credentials: Founder: info@carryon.us / Demo1234!, Manager: ops_manager_1 / Manager123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Milestone delivery workflow implemented. Stats at /api/milestones/deliveries/stats. Deliveries list at /api/milestones/deliveries with status filter. Detail at /api/milestones/deliveries/{id}. Review at /api/milestones/deliveries/{id}/review with action=approve|reject. Only beneficiaries can report milestones (POST /api/milestones/report). Frontend has MilestoneDeliveriesTab.js component in both Founder and Operator portals. To test full flow: 1) Create message with trigger_type=event, 2) Beneficiary reports matching milestone, 3) Verify pending delivery created, 4) Approve via review endpoint.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/milestones/deliveries/{id} - Detail with matched_message, all_estate_messages, milestone_report
POST /api/milestones/deliveries/{id}/review - Approve/reject with message delivery on approve
POST /api/milestones/report - Beneficiary milestone report (creates pending deliveries, NOT auto-deliver)
frontend_components: MilestoneDeliveriesTab - Stats cards, delivery list, detail view, approve/reject buttons
Sidebar.js - Milestones nav item for operators at /ops/milestones
notification_triggers: notify.all_staff() when milestone report has matching messages

screenshots_captured: .screenshots/milestones_verified.png - Founder portal Milestones tab with stats and empty state
